archimate:Assessment.name: Key Structural IoP Enablers
archimate:Assessment.documentation:
Definition: Key Structural IoP Enablers ABB is a Grouping enabling information interpretation to share and/or reuse of organizational resources of digital public services
Source: ISA2-EIF
Source reference: https://ec.europa.eu/isa2/eif_en/
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Viewpoint: Key Interoperability Enablers viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyStructuralIoPEnablersAssessment
ABB name: eira:KeyStructuralIoPEnablersAssessment
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/KeyStructuralIoPEnablersAssessment
Interoperability Layer: N/A

properties.value: Key Structural IoP Enablers ABB is a Grouping enabling information interpretation to share and/or reuse of organizational resources of digital public services
